name: Omelets
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix 8 eggs and 1/2 cup water.
2. In a 7- to 10-inch omelet pan or skillet over medium-high heat, melt 4 tablespoons butter until just hot enough to sizzle a drop of water.
3. Pour in the egg mixture (it should set immediately at the edges).
4. Gently push cooked portions at the edges toward the center using an inverted pancake turner so that uncooked portions can reach the hot pan surface, tilting and moving the cooked portions as necessary.
NOTE: It is better to fill slightly underdone omelet; heat retained in eggs completes the cooking. For a more authentic touch, add a few drops of hot pepper sauce.
